# 39. Offsite Watering

## Location

The location offsite watering is defined in **non_structure_bmp** section using **offsite_watering_shapefile**. The shapefile must be a point type. This BMP must be used when grazing management is used. One example is given below.

*\[non_structure_bmp\]*

*offsite_watering_shapefile = offsite_watering.shp*
